title: Builders FirstSource Stock is Building Out a Base

title: Should I Buy Housing Stocks Amid Rising Mortgage Rates?
text: Record housing shortages, backlog conversions, and spiking real estate prices have led to major upside for some companies in the housing market. Last year, REITs were a top-performing sector (+46.2%). However, this year, in the face of rising interest rates, sectors such as real estate are cooling off.

title: Builders FirstSource (BLDR) Rises on Q1 Earnings & Revenue Beat
text: Builders FirstSource's (BLDR) first-quarter results reflect solid organic sales growth, gross margin and adjusted EBITDA amid supply woes.

title: Builders FirstSource Shares Gain On Q1 Earnings Beat
text: Builders FirstSource Inc (NYSE: BLDR) reported first-quarter FY22 sales growth of 36.1% year-on-year to $5.68 billion, beating the consensus of $4.60 billion. Double-digit core organic growth, commodity inflation, and acquisitions drove the top-line growth.

title: Builders FirstSource (BLDR) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: Builders FirstSource (BLDR) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 81.40% and 19.62%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: 3 High-Quality Stocks to Buy During This Market Selloff
